parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ api_key: $env.APOLLO_API_KEY, q_organization_num_employees_ranges: ['11,200','201,1000'], person_titles: ['CEO','CTO','COO','Head of Operations','VP Sales','Founder'], person_locations: ['France','Belgium','Switzerland','Canada'], organization_locations: ['France','Belgium','Switzerland','Canada'], contact_email_status: ['verified','likely to engage'], page: 1, per_page: 25 }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const leads = $input.first().json.people || [];
console.log(`[Apollo] ${leads.length} leads fetched`);
return leads.map(p => ({ json: {
  apollo_id: p.id,
  first_name: p.first_name,
  last_name: p.last_name,
  full_name: `${p.first_name} ${p.last_name}`,
  email: p.email,
  title: p.title,
  linkedin_url: p.linkedin_url,
  company: p.organization?.name,
  company_domain: p.organization?.primary_domain,
  company_size: p.organization?.num_employees,
  company_industry: p.organization?.industry,
  company_city: p.organization?.city,
  company_country: p.organization?.country,
  company_technologies: p.organization?.technology_names || [],
  company_revenue: p.organization?.estimated_num_employees,
  seniority: p.seniority,
  fetched_at: new Date().toISOString()
}}));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'email', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.email }] }], properties: ['email','hs_lead_status','lifecyclestage','hubspot_score','last_contacted'], limit: 1 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ api_key: $env.APOLLO_API_KEY, id: $json.apollo_id, reveal_personal_emails: false, reveal_phone_number: false }) }}

values.content:
You are a B2B sales intelligence expert specializing in AI/automation services targeting SMBs (10-1000 employees).

Analyze this prospect profile and return a JSON with:
{
  "icp_score": 0-100,
  "icp_segment": "HOT|WARM|COLD|DISQUALIFIED",
  "fit_reasons": ["reason1", "reason2", "reason3"],
  "pain_points": ["likely pain 1", "likely pain 2"],
  "automation_opportunities": ["opp1", "opp2"],
  "personalization_hook": "one compelling personalized opening line referencing their specific situation",
  "recommended_service": "n8n_automation|ai_agent|saas_mvp|workflow",
  "email_subject": "compelling subject line under 60 chars",
  "email_tone": "executive|technical|friendly",
  "disqualify_reason": "reason if DISQUALIFIED, else null"
}

Score criteria:
- Company size 20-500: +20pts
- Tech-forward industry: +20pts  
- Decision-maker title: +20pts
- Known tech stack (Hubspot/Salesforce/Notion): +15pts
- Intent signals present: +25pts
- Wrong industry/too small/too large: -points

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { email: $json.email, firstname: $json.first_name, lastname: $json.last_name, jobtitle: $json.title, company: $json.company, website: 'https://' + ($json.company_domain || ''), hs_lead_status: $json.icp_segment, hubspot_score: $json.icp_score, lifecyclestage: $json.icp_score >= 80 ? 'salesqualifiedlead' : 'lead', note_icp_fit: $json.fit_reasons?.join(' | '), note_pain_points: $json.pain_points?.join(' | '), note_service: $json.recommended_service, apollo_id: $json.apollo_id, source: 'apollo_autopilot' } }) }}

values.content:
You are Oussama Abassi, an expert n8n automation and AI agent developer. Write a highly personalized, concise cold email (max 120 words) in French.

Rules:
- Start directly with the personalization hook (no 'Bonjour, je me présente')
- Mention their specific company/industry/situation
- One concrete problem they likely have
- One specific solution you offer
- One clear CTA (15-min call link)
- Conversational, peer-to-peer tone — not salesy
- Signature: Oussama A. | Automation & AI | oussama.dev

Return ONLY the email body text, no subject line, no markdown.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'email', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.email }] }], properties: ['hs_email_open', 'hs_email_click', 'notes_last_updated', 'hs_sales_email_last_replied'] }) }}

values.content: Write a short, compelling follow-up email (max 80 words) in French. Reference the first email naturally. Add new value — don't just 'check in'. Mention a specific use case or quick win relevant to their industry. End with a low-commitment CTA (15-min video call or just a yes/no question). Conversational tone. No subject line needed.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'email', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.email }] }], properties: ['hs_sales_email_last_replied', 'notes_last_updated'] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { dealname: $json.company + ' — ' + $json.recommended_service, dealstage: 'appointmentscheduled', pipeline: 'default', amount: $json.icp_score >= 80 ? 1500 : 800, closedate: $now.plus({ days: 30 }).toISO(), hubspot_owner_id: $env.HUBSPOT_OWNER_ID, deal_source: 'apollo_autopilot', icp_score: $json.icp_score }, associations: [{ types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 3 }], to: { id: $json.hubspot_contact_id } }] }) }}

parameters.subject: 📅 15 minutes — {{ $json.company }} × Oussama
parameters.message:
Bonjour {{ $json.first_name }},

Merci pour votre retour. Je serai ravi d'échanger 15 minutes pour vous montrer concrètement comment j'aborderais votre situation chez {{ $json.company }}.

→ Choisir un créneau (15 min)

Si vous préférez, partagez-moi directement vos disponibilités.

À très vite,
Oussama A.
Automation & IA | oussama.dev

values.content: You are a B2B sales intelligence analyst. Generate a concise pre-meeting briefing for a sales call. Include: company overview, likely challenges, competitive landscape, 3 talking points, 3 qualifying questions to ask, and a recommended solution angle. Max 250 words. Professional format.

parameters.subject: 📋 Brief pré-RDV — {{ $json.full_name }} / {{ $json.company }}
parameters.message:
Brief pré-RDV — {{ $json.full_name }}

{{ $json.title }} @ {{ $json.company }} ({{ $json.company_industry }}, {{ $json.company_size }} emp.)

Score ICP: {{ $json.icp_score }}/100 | Service: {{ $json.recommended_service }}

Analyse intelligence IA :

{{ $json.message?.content }}

Tech stack détecté: {{ $json.company_technologies?.join(', ') }}

Profil LinkedIn: {{ $json.linkedin_url }}

parameters.content:
## 🚀 B2B Revenue Intelligence & Outreach Autopilot

**Flux 1 — Prospection quotidienne (08:00) :**
1. Fetch leads Apollo.io (ICP: CEO/CTO, 10-1000 emp, France/BE/CH/CA)
2. Check HubSpot — éviter doublons
3. Enrichissement complet profil Apollo
4. GPT-4o : score ICP 0-100 + segment + pain points
5. Route : HOT(≥80) / WARM(60-79) / COLD(40-59) / Disqualified
6. HubSpot : création contact enrichi
7. GPT-4o : email ultra-personnalisé par secteur/titre/stack
8. Envoi email séquence 1
9. Log Google Sheets

**Flux 2 — Suivi séquencé :**
10. Wait 3 jours → check engagement HubSpot
11. Si ouverture/clic → follow-up GPT-4o J+3
12. Wait 4 jours → check réponse
13. Si réponse → Slack alert + Deal HubSpot + Calendly
14. GPT-4o : brief pré-meeting intelligence
15. Email brief à Oussama

**Flux 3 — Rapport hebdo (Vendredi 17h) :**
16. Collecte KPIs semaine
17. Calcul métriques pipeline
18. Rapport Slack

**Variables requises :**
- APOLLO_API_KEY, HUBSPOT_TOKEN, HUBSPOT_OWNER_ID
- OUTREACH_SHEET_ID
- Channels Slack: C_HOT_LEADS, C_SALES_WEEKLY

meta.description: Système complet d'intelligence commerciale B2B : fetch Apollo → scoring ICP GPT-4o → HubSpot enrichi → séquence emails personnalisés → suivi engagement → deal auto → brief pré-RDV → rapport hebdo Slack.
